allow: Bash(sed -i 's/<title>Product List - Brian PC Component<\\/title>/<title>Shopping Cart - Brian PC Component<\\/title>/' cart.html)
Bash(sed -i 's/<title>Compare Product - Brian PC Component<\\/title>/<title>Checkout - Brian PC Component<\\/title>/' checkout.html)
Bash(sed -i 's/<input type=""checkbox""> 8-16 characters/<input type=""checkbox"" id=""rule-length""> 8-16 characters/g' "$f")
Bash(sed -i 's/<input type=""checkbox""> At least 1 special character/<input type=""checkbox"" id=""rule-special""> At least 1 special character/g' "$f")
Bash(sed -i 's/<input type=""checkbox""> At least 1 uppercase letter/<input type=""checkbox"" id=""rule-upper""> At least 1 uppercase letter/g' "$f")
